title: • Fletcher humiliates Andrew, pushing him beyond his limits.
content:
• Fletcher humiliates Andrew, pushing him beyond his limits.
2. Act 2: Confrontation (Struggles & Crisis Point)
• Andrew’s obsession with impressing Fletcher takes over his life.
• He isolates himself, practicing to the point of injury.
• After a disastrous performance, Fletcher kicks him out of the band.
• Andrew violently lashes out, leading to his expulsion.
3. Act 3: Resolution (Climax & New Normal)
• Andrew hits rock bottom, giving up music.
• Fletcher invites him to a gig, secretly setting him up to fail.
• Instead of backing down, Andrew takes control, proving his worth.
• The final scene is a non-verbal battle between teacher and student—mutual destruction or mutual respect?

Story Breakdown 2: Real (Hero’s Journey)

Theme: Finding purpose after loss.
1. Ordinary World – Three protagonists struggle with different disabilities and personal failures.
2. Call to Adventure – They each discover wheelchair basketball as a possible path forward.
context: From document: The Graphic Novel Writing Guide for Derek: Inspiration, Structure… — chunk 10 (chunk 10/22)
